response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a strong full-stack and backend engineer, but his profile fundamentally mismatches the role requirements. His C++ exposure is limited to approximately 6 months at National Instruments and a university thesis project, far short of the 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows required. His SQL experience appears surface-level with no evidence of SQL Server or Oracle expertise. While he has some capital-markets adjacency through RIDE Capital, that work was in Node.js/TypeScript, not C++, and there is no Fixed Income or derivatives domain knowledge anywhere in the resume. The candidate's genuine strengths lie in web, cloud, and DevOps, none of which are central to this role.
strengths: Capital-markets adjacent experience at RIDE Capital demonstrates some familiarity with financial-services software context
Strong CI/CD and DevOps background (GitLab, Docker, Artifactory) aligns with the desirable CI/CD pipeline skill
Java background listed across multiple roles satisfies the optional Java desirable criterion
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~6 months at NI + a thesis project) against a mandatory requirement of 5–10 years
No evidence of Windows-platform C++ development; career is predominantly Linux and web-based
No SQL Server or Oracle experience and no Fixed Income, Fixed Income Derivatives, or Investment Banking domain knowledge

key_factors.factor: No Fixed Income / capital-markets C++ domain
